passages: Our marketing team is currently finalizing the promotional strategy for the upcoming laptop release. We are confident that the new design will ______ the needs of our target demographic, as it combines high performance with an accessible price point.

questions.question: Our marketing team is currently finalizing the promotional strategy for the upcoming laptop release. We are confident that the new design will ______ the needs of our target demographic, as it combines high performance with an accessible price point.

options.A: address
options.B: accumulate
options.C: alleviate
options.D: advocate

questions.explanation: 答案為 (A)。address 在商務情境中常指「處理、應對、解決（問題或需求）」。句意為：我們深信新設計將能滿足（處理）我們目標客群的需求。其他選項：(B) 累積、(C) 減輕（痛苦或負擔）、(D) 提倡，皆不符合語意。

theme: 採購合約與供應商談判
passages: After several rounds of intense negotiations, the procurement department finally reached a consensus with the vendor regarding the delivery schedule. To ensure that both parties adhere to the agreed-upon standards, they decided to ______ the new terms into the existing master service agreement.

questions.question: After several rounds of intense negotiations, the procurement department finally reached a consensus with the vendor regarding the delivery schedule. To ensure that both parties adhere to the agreed-upon standards, they decided to ______ the new terms into the existing master service agreement.

options.A: incorporate
options.B: terminate
options.C: fluctuate
options.D: withdraw

questions.explanation: 本題考查商務合約情境動詞。incorporate (將...納入/合併) 符合語境，意指將新條款納入既有合約中。terminate 是終止，fluctuate 是波動，withdraw 是撤回，皆不符合語意。

theme: 公司財務報表與預算會議
passages: During the quarterly budget review meeting, the CFO emphasized that all department heads must strictly adhere to the _______ allocation of funds to ensure the company remains profitable throughout the fiscal year.

questions.question: During the quarterly budget review meeting, the CFO emphasized that all department heads must strictly adhere to the _______ allocation of funds to ensure the company remains profitable throughout the fiscal year.

options.A: designated
options.B: versatile
options.C: provisional
options.D: negligent

questions.explanation: 本題考查形容詞辨析。designated 為「指定的、已分配的」，符合語境中指預算分配的正確性。versatile 意為「多才多藝的」；provisional 意為「臨時的」；negligent 意為「疏忽的」。故選 A。

passages: The marketing team has decided to ______ the official launch date of the new smartphone series by two weeks to ensure all promotional materials are fully localized for the international market.

questions.question: The marketing team has decided to ______ the official launch date of the new smartphone series by two weeks to ensure all promotional materials are fully localized for the international market.

options.A: postpone
options.B: terminate
options.C: accelerate
options.D: abandon

questions.explanation: 本題考查商務情境中的動詞辨析。根據句意，為了確保行銷素材在地化，團隊決定將發表日期「延後」兩週。postpone 為「延後」之意，符合邏輯；terminate 為終止，accelerate 為加速，abandon 為放棄，皆不符合語境。

passages:
Subject: Update on Q3 Marketing Campaign Collaboration

Dear Team,

I am writing to provide an update regarding the upcoming Q3 promotional campaign. Due to the recent server maintenance scheduled for the IT department, the launch of our digital advertising platform will be delayed by three days. Consequently, the Marketing department will need to adjust the deadline for the final creative assets submission.

Originally, all graphics and copy were due by this Friday. However, we are extending the deadline to next Tuesday, October 15th, at 5:00 PM. Please ensure that all files are uploaded to the shared server folder labeled 'Q3_Campaign_Assets' by this time. If your team anticipates any difficulty in meeting this revised schedule, please notify me directly by the end of the business day tomorrow.

Thank you for your flexibility and continued hard work.

Best regards,

Sarah Jenkins
Marketing Manager

questions.question: Why is the deadline for the creative assets being extended?

options.A: The Marketing team needs more time to brainstorm ideas.
options.B: The IT department is performing server maintenance.
options.C: The server folder is currently experiencing technical errors.
options.D: Sarah Jenkins is unavailable to review the materials this week.

questions.explanation: 信件中提到，由於 IT 部門安排的伺服器維護，數位廣告平台的上線時間延後，因此行銷部門也隨之調整了素材提交期限。

questions.question: What are employees instructed to do if they cannot meet the new deadline?

options.A: Contact the IT department for technical support.
options.B: Upload the incomplete files to the shared folder.
options.C: Inform Sarah Jenkins by the end of the day tomorrow.
options.D: Submit the assets by Friday as originally planned.

questions.explanation: 信件最後一段提到，若預計無法達成新的期限，請在明天工作日結束前直接通知 Sarah Jenkins。

theme: 廠房公安與生產線維護
passages:
To: All Production Staff
From: Marcus Thorne, Plant Manager
Date: October 12
Subject: Urgent: Scheduled Maintenance and Safety Protocol Update

This is to inform all personnel that the main assembly line (Line 4) will be shut down for mandatory maintenance from October 18th to October 20th. During this period, our technical team will be replacing the hydraulic sensors to ensure compliance with the new regional safety standards. 

All staff assigned to Line 4 are required to attend a mandatory safety briefing on October 17th at 9:00 AM in the Training Center. Please be advised that the use of personal protective equipment (PPE), specifically the upgraded heat-resistant gloves, will be strictly enforced upon the line's reopening. Failure to comply with these updated protocols will result in immediate disciplinary action. We appreciate your cooperation in maintaining a safe work environment.

questions.question: What is the primary reason for the shutdown of Line 4?

options.A: To conduct a general inspection of the Training Center.
options.B: To install new equipment to meet safety regulations.
options.C: To train new employees on assembly techniques.
options.D: To resolve a recurring issue with the cooling system.

questions.explanation: 文中提到維護是為了更換液壓感測器（replacing the hydraulic sensors）以確保符合新的區域安全標準（compliance with the new regional safety standards），故選B。

questions.question: What are employees required to do on October 17th?

options.A: Report to the maintenance team for equipment testing.
options.B: Purchase new heat-resistant gloves from the office.
options.C: Attend a compulsory safety meeting.
options.D: Complete a performance evaluation form.

questions.explanation: 信件中明確指出，所有被分配到 Line 4 的員工必須在 10 月 17 日上午 9 點參加強制性的安全說明會（mandatory safety briefing），故選C。

theme: 辦公室日常與人事公告
passages:
To: All Staff
From: Human Resources Department
Date: October 15, 2023
Subject: Office Relocation and Desk Reassignment

Please be advised that our corporate headquarters will undergo a major renovation starting November 1. Due to the construction, all employees in the Marketing and Sales departments will be temporarily relocated to the third floor of the West Wing. 

We have attached a floor plan detailing the new desk assignments. Please ensure that all personal items are packed into the provided moving crates by the end of business on October 31. IT support staff will be available on November 2 to assist with the reconnection of computers and peripherals. If you have any concerns regarding your assigned workspace, please submit a formal request to the HR office by October 25. We appreciate your cooperation during this transition.

questions.question: What are employees in the Marketing and Sales departments required to do by October 31?

options.A: Submit a formal request for a new desk.
options.B: Pack their personal belongings into moving crates.
options.C: Reconnect their computers and peripherals.
options.D: Complete the renovation of the third floor.

questions.explanation: 信件中明確提到：Please ensure that all personal items are packed into the provided moving crates by the end of business on October 31. 因此正確答案為 B。

questions.question: What should an employee do if they are unhappy with their new desk location?

options.A: Contact the IT support staff immediately.
options.B: Move their belongings to an empty desk.
options.C: Send a formal request to HR by October 25.
options.D: Wait until the renovation is finished in November.

questions.explanation: 信件中提到：If you have any concerns regarding your assigned workspace, please submit a formal request to the HR office by October 25. 因此正確答案為 C。

theme: 廠房公安與生產線維護 (Factory Safety & Maintenance)
passages:
[DOC 1] MEMORANDUM
To: All Production Staff
From: Facilities Management
Date: October 12
Subject: Emergency Maintenance of Line 4

Please be advised that Production Line 4 will undergo mandatory safety inspections and emergency maintenance starting October 15 at 8:00 A.M. This is due to a recurring sensor malfunction that poses a risk to operator safety. The line will be completely shut down for 48 hours. Employees assigned to Line 4 are required to report to the supervisor’s office at 9:00 A.M. on the first day for temporary reassignment to the packaging department. All safety gear, including hard hats and steel-toed boots, must be worn at all times during the transition period. Failure to comply will result in disciplinary action.

[DOC 2] EMAIL
From: Marcus Thorne <m.thorne@factory.com>
To: Facilities Management
Date: October 13
Subject: Re: Emergency Maintenance of Line 4

Dear Facilities Team,
I am one of the operators currently assigned to Line 4. Regarding your memo from yesterday, I have a concern regarding the reassignment. My certification for operating the industrial packing machinery expired last month. I have already submitted my renewal application to HR, but I have not received the updated permit yet. Will I still be required to report to the packaging department, or should I be assigned to manual inventory sorting instead? I want to ensure I remain compliant with our safety regulations.

Best regards,
Marcus Thorne

questions.question: What is the primary reason for the shutdown of Production Line 4?

options.A: Scheduled annual maintenance
options.B: A sensor issue that could endanger workers
options.C: Low production output
options.D: Upgrading to new machinery

questions.explanation: 文中提到 due to a recurring sensor malfunction that poses a risk to operator safety，故選B。

questions.question: When is the maintenance on Line 4 expected to be completed?

options.A: October 15 at 8:00 A.M.
options.B: October 16 at 9:00 A.M.
options.C: October 17 at 8:00 A.M.
options.D: October 18 at 9:00 A.M.

questions.explanation: 維護從 10/15 早上 8 點開始，為期 48 小時，因此結束時間為 10/17 早上 8 點。

questions.question: What are Line 4 employees expected to do on the first day of the shutdown?

options.A: Stay at home until the maintenance is finished
options.B: Help with the maintenance of the sensors
options.C: Attend a safety training session in the conference room
options.D: Go to the supervisor’s office for new work assignments

questions.explanation: Memo 指出 employees are required to report to the supervisor’s office at 9:00 A.M. for temporary reassignment。

questions.question: Why did Marcus Thorne write the email?

options.A: To request an extension on his certification renewal
options.B: To clarify his temporary duty status due to a certification issue
options.C: To complain about the safety gear requirements
options.D: To report a new malfunction on the packaging line

questions.explanation: Marcus 詢問因為證照過期，是否仍應被分配到包裝部門，故選B。

questions.question: What can be inferred about the factory's safety policy?

options.A: Employees are allowed to operate machinery without current permits
options.B: Safety gear is optional during maintenance periods
options.C: Strict adherence to safety protocols is mandatory
options.D: The packaging department has the lowest safety standards

questions.explanation: Memo 中提到 failure to comply with safety gear rules will result in disciplinary action，顯示公司對安全規範執行嚴格。

passages:
[DOC 1] New Tech Innovations Product Launch Schedule: October 15th
09:00 AM - 10:00 AM: Keynote Speech by CEO Sarah Jenkins
10:30 AM - 12:00 PM: Live Product Demonstration (Main Stage)
12:00 PM - 01:30 PM: Networking Lunch (Grand Ballroom)
02:00 PM - 03:30 PM: Breakout Sessions: Marketing Strategy & Global Distribution
04:00 PM - 05:00 PM: Closing Remarks and Q&A

[DOC 2] Memo: Urgent Schedule Update
To: All Marketing Staff
From: Event Planning Committee
Subject: Changes to October 15th Agenda
Due to an unforeseen flight delay affecting our keynote speaker, Sarah Jenkins, we have adjusted the schedule. The Keynote Speech will now take place from 01:30 PM to 02:30 PM, following the lunch. Consequently, the afternoon breakout sessions have been canceled to allow for more time during the Q&A session, which will now start at 02:45 PM. Please ensure all marketing materials are updated to reflect these changes before the event starts.

questions.question: According to the original schedule in DOC 1, what was supposed to happen immediately after the lunch break?

options.A: Keynote Speech
options.B: Live Product Demonstration
options.C: Breakout Sessions
options.D: Closing Remarks

questions.explanation: 根據 DOC 1，午餐後（12:00 PM - 01:30 PM）的下一個行程是 02:00 PM 開始的 Breakout Sessions。

questions.question: What is the primary reason for the schedule adjustment mentioned in DOC 2?

options.A: The venue was double-booked.
options.B: The CEO's flight was delayed.
options.C: Low registration for the breakout sessions.
options.D: The marketing materials were not ready.

questions.explanation: DOC 2 明確指出調整行程的原因是 Sarah Jenkins 的班機延誤。

questions.question: Which activity has been removed from the schedule entirely?

options.A: The Keynote Speech
options.B: The Networking Lunch
options.C: The Breakout Sessions
options.D: The Live Product Demonstration

questions.explanation: DOC 2 提到下午的分組會議（Breakout Sessions）已被取消以騰出時間。

questions.question: What time will the Q&A session start following the revised schedule?
questions.explanation: DOC 2 指出 Q&A 環節將會在 02:45 PM 開始。

passages:
[DOC 1] 

TECH-ELITE PROMOTION: The All-New 'Zenith X1' Laptop

Experience the pinnacle of performance with the Zenith X1. Designed for professionals who demand speed and reliability, our latest model features a 16-hour battery life, a lightweight aluminum chassis, and the revolutionary 'Silence-Cool' cooling system. 

Special Launch Offer: Purchase the Zenith X1 before October 31st and receive a complimentary 'Pro-Dock' docking station (valued at $199). 

Visit our flagship store or order online at www.tech-elite.com. Enjoy free shipping on all orders over $500. We guarantee a 30-day satisfaction policy on all hardware purchases.

[DOC 2]

To: Customer Support (support@tech-elite.com)
From: Marcus Thorne (m.thorne@logistics-plus.com)
Subject: Issue with Zenith X1 Order #99281

Dear Support Team,

I am writing to express my frustration regarding my recent purchase of the Zenith X1 laptop. I ordered the device on October 25th, specifically to take advantage of the 'Pro-Dock' promotion. 

However, upon receiving the package yesterday, I found the laptop, but the docking station was missing. Furthermore, the laptop itself has a noticeable dent on the bottom casing. I attempted to call your support hotline, but the line was busy for over an hour. Given that I rely on this equipment for my remote logistics work, I require an immediate resolution. Please arrange for a replacement unit and the missing docking station to be sent via express shipping. I have attached photos of the damage for your reference.

Regards,
Marcus Thorne

questions.question: What is a key feature of the Zenith X1 according to the advertisement?

options.A: It comes with a built-in printer.
options.B: It has an aluminum chassis.
options.C: It includes a 5-year warranty.
options.D: It is priced under $500.

questions.explanation: 廣告中提到 Zenith X1 具有輕量化鋁製機身 (lightweight aluminum chassis)。

questions.question: What must a customer do to receive the free 'Pro-Dock'?

options.A: Purchase the laptop before the end of October.
options.B: Sign up for the company newsletter.
options.C: Order the laptop from a physical retail store only.
options.D: Spend more than $1,000 on accessories.

questions.explanation: 廣告說明在 10 月 31 日前購買即可獲得免費的 docking station。

questions.question: Why did Marcus Thorne contact the customer support team?

options.A: He wants to return the laptop for a full refund.
options.B: He is inquiring about the shipping status of his order.
options.C: The docking station was not included and the laptop is damaged.
options.D: He is complaining about the poor battery life of the device.

questions.explanation: Marcus 在信中指出 Docking station 遺失且筆電底部有凹痕。

questions.question: What does Marcus Thorne expect the company to do?

options.A: Provide a full refund for the order.
options.B: Send a replacement laptop and the missing docking station.
options.C: Repair the dented laptop at a local service center.
options.D: Offer him a discount on his next purchase.

questions.explanation: Marcus 要求公司安排更換筆電並透過快遞寄送遺失的 docking station。

questions.question: Which statement is true regarding Marcus Thorne's order?

options.A: He ordered the laptop on October 30th.
options.B: He was able to resolve the issue via the telephone hotline.
options.C: He is satisfied with the speed of the laptop.
options.D: He qualified for the promotional offer mentioned in the advertisement.

questions.explanation: Marcus 在 10 月 25 日購買，符合 10 月 31 日前的促銷條件，因此他具備領取贈品的資格。
